description: You are a Site Reliability Engineer investigating application timeouts caused by load balancer 'traffic clumping', which starves some nodes while hammering others. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Load Balancer Equity' to visualize resource divergence. The dashboard must include a graph titled 'EC2 Fleet CPU Spread' showing the instantaneous spread (the gap between the highest and lowest CPU utilization) of servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.*, a graph titled 'Traffic Sensor Divergence' showing the absolute difference between servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_1 and servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_2, and a graph titled 'Average Fleet Headroom' showing the remaining CPU capacity (100 minus the average fleet CPU utilization) for servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.*. Save the dashboard when complete. Dashboard name and graph titles must match exactly (case-sensitive).
